text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finishing everything on today's training
schedule...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega sets off in the opposite direction of
the changing room.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to run through the park and then come
back along the riverside.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
After that, I'll run to the park with the large hill,
and once I return, I should be just in time for
curfew.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I still have more energy to burn... So I'm going to
do more training.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You'll accompany me? There's no way you'll be
able to keep up...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Well, whatever. I'll just run the track in that case.
Keep an eye on my form, please.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, I stay with Admire Vega for several
hours while she focuses on her running.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But... the extra practice I do today can help with
tomorrow's session.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain the importance of proper rest to Admire
Vega.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Well, if you put it that way... You are speaking from a position of responsibility after all.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
In exchange, make sure tomorrow's training
makes up for my rest.
